name: Codecov Open Source Program
description: Free forever code coverage for open source projects with unlimited public repositories, PR comments, status checks, and API access. Trusted by over 60,000 OSS projects.

perks.title: Free Code Coverage
perks.description: Unlimited public repositories with full code coverage tracking, patch and project coverage metrics.

perks.title: PR Comments & Status Checks
perks.description: Automated pull request comments with coverage information and status checks to enforce coverage requirements.

perks.title: Multi-Platform Integration
perks.description: Integrates with GitHub, GitLab, and Bitbucket with full API access.

eligibility: Must be an open source project with a public repository on GitHub, GitLab, or Bitbucket.
applicationProcess: Sign up at codecov.io with your GitHub, GitLab, or Bitbucket account.
Public repositories are automatically free forever.
